briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to uninitialized memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_init() is called with no memory area
Then buffer is initialized, has zero size and capacity and its pointer to first byte of the buffer is null

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to uninitialized memory buffer (membuf) and some memory region

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_init() is called with a pointer to the region and its size
Then buffer is initialized, has zero size, capacity equal to memory region size and its pointer to first byte of the buffer points to provided memory region

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to uninitialized memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When MEMBUF_INIT is used to initialize buffer
Then buffer is initialized, has zero size and capacity and its pointer to first byte of the buffer is null

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to uninitialized memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When MEMBUF_INIT is used to initialize buffer
Then all buffer fields are initialized to null pointers

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_alloc() is called with a pointer to non-zero size variable

Then a pointer to reserved memory at buffer's beginning is returned, passed size variable is not modified, the buffer's current position indicator is moved by requested size and capacity is reduced by the same value calls membuf_seek()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_alloc() is called with a pointer to non-zero size variable

Then a pointer to reserved memory in the buffer directly after end of previous allocation is returned, passed size variable is not modified, the buffer's current position indicator is moved by requested size and capacity is reduced by the same value calls membuf_seek()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with half memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_alloc() is called with a pointer to size variable equal to remaining buffer capacity

Then a pointer to reserved memory in the buffer directly after end of previous allocation is returned, passed size variable is not modified, the buffer's current position indicator is moved to the end of buffer and there is no space left in the buffer calls membuf_seek()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with most memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_alloc() is called with a pointer to size variable greater than remaining buffer capacity

Then a pointer to reserved memory in the buffer directly after end of previous allocation is returned, passed size variable is changed to space size available before the call, the buffer's current position indicator is moved to the end of buffer and there is no space left in the buffer calls membuf_seek()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_clear() is called
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_clear() is called()
Then the buffer's current position indicator is moved to the beginning and full capacity is available

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_seek() is called with some positive offset less than remaining buffer's capacity
Then requested offset value is returned; the buffer's current position indicator is moved by requested offset and capacity is reduced by the same value

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_seek() is called with a negative offset of absolute value equal to already allocated size
Then requested negative offset value is returned; the buffer is rewound to its beginning and full capacity is available

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_seek() is called with some positive offset value greater than left buffer capacity
Then remaining capacity from before the call is returned; the buffer's current position indicator is moved to the end of buffer and there is no more capacity left

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some memory already used

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_seek() is called with a negative offset of absolute value greater than already allocated size
Then allocated size from before the call is returned; buffer is rewound to its beginning and full capacity is available

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_write() is called with a non-null pointer to some data and size equal zero
Then zero is returned, nothing is changed calls membuf_alloc()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_write() is called with a non-null pointer to some data and data's size

Then requested data size is returned; requested data was written to the buffer and the buffer's current position indicator is moved by requested size and capacity is reduced by the same value calls membuf_alloc() calls memcpy()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some data already written

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_write() is called with a non-null pointer to some data and data's size

Then requested data size is returned; requested data was written to the buffer directly after previously written data; buffer's current position indicator points at one past just written data calls membuf_alloc() calls memcpy()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_write() is called with a non-null pointer to some data and its size, both exceeding the buffer's capacity

Then the buffer's remaining capacity from before the call is returned, data was written into the buffer until its end, rest was discarded and there is no space left in the buffer calls membuf_alloc() calls memcpy()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some data already written

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_reserve() is called with a non zero capacity less than or equal to remaining buffer capacity
Then buffer's initial capacity is returned, nothing is changed calls membuf_capacity()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with no remaining capacity

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_reserve() is called with some non-zero capacity
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed, ERRNUM_NOMEM error number is set calls membuf_capacity() calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_flush() is called with some size
Then nothing is changed calls membuf_size()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some data already written

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_flush() is called with size greater than or equal to the size of already written data
Then already written data is removed, the buffer is empty and at full capacity calls membuf_size() calls memmove()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf) with some data already written

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_flush() is called with non-zero size less than the size of already written data
Then part of already written data after requested flush size is moved to the beginning of the buffer, remaining capacity is increased by requested flush size calls membuf_size() calls memmove()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_begin() is called before and after writing some data to it
Then a pointer to the buffer's beginning is returned from both calls

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_size() is called before and after writing some data to it
Then zero is returned from the first call and written data size from the second call

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to memory buffer (membuf)

detaileddescription.para: When membuf_capacity() is called before and after writing some data to it
Then the buffer's full capacity is returned from the first call and then reduced by written data size from the second call

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
2020-2024 N7 Space Sp. z o.o.
Unit Test Suite was developed under a programme of, and funded by, the European Space Agency.

You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0 Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
